---
title: "Byeong-Hak Choe"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/bchoe2017.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/byeonghakchoe/
      
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/climate_econ
      
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/bclog1
      
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: https://bclog1.github.io/choe-cv.pdf
      
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:bchoe@geneseo.edu

---


Byeong-Hak Choe is .....

## Education

University of Wyoming | Laramie, WY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>
Minor in Business Administration 

## Experience

Starbucks Analytics | Data Analyst Intern | May 2024 - Aug 2024
